title: pavetta indica subsp. tomentosa
intro: Pavetta indica subsp. tomentosa, also known as the hairy Pavetta or hairy forestiera, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pavetta indica subsp. tomentosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support digestive health, among other benefits. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
